title: SeeVee
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:Okeefe_and_ASP.jpg]] |name=SeeVee |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] |creator= |manufacturer= |line=[[ASP-series labor droid/Legends|ASP-series droid]] |model=[[ASP-7 labor droid/Legends|ASP-7 labor droid]] |class=[[Labor droid/Legends|Labor droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Masculine programming]] |pronouns=new |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=[[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] }} {{Quote|Move it. I don't want to miss anything.''"
"''Affirmative.|Darrik and SeeVee|''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]''}} '''SeeVee''' or '''C-V''' was an [[ASP-7 labor droid/Legends|ASP-7 labor droid]] owned by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]]. The droid served her onboard the [[Last Chance (YT-1300 light freighter)/Legends|''Last Chance'']]. ==History== Like many ASP series droids, he was only capable of answering either "affirmative" or "negative". The droid often got on Okeefe's nerves and annoyed many customs inspectors; sometimes with positive results, sometimes negative.''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]'' At one point while smuggling Imperial-issue heavy [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] shot down [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] over the planet Dorajan. Crashing in the jungles, Okeefe had to work running repairs on her ship, aided only by SeeVee. However the droid was a cheap model with slow processing speed and proved little practical help. Nevertheless, Okeefe managed the repairs and evaded the Imperial picket.''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]'' Later, SeeVee was present on the ''Last Chance'' when a [[Brentaalan]] boy, [[Darrik]], tried to stowaway. The droid traveled with Okeefe and Darrik to the planet [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. There, the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Beylyssa]] infiltrated the ''Last Chance'' disguised as a [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Wing Guard]]. In her frustration at not finding Okeefe there, she destroyed the droid, knocking its head off with a powerful kick. ==Appearances== *{{WEGCite|story=Better Than Nothing|book=Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook}} {{1st}} *''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]'' ==Sources== *''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=SeeVee }} [[Category:ASP-7 labor droids]] [[Category:Droids with masculine programming]]
